name: @runanywhere/web-llamacpp
description: RunAnywhere Web SDK - LlamaCpp backend for on-device LLM/VLM inference

scripts.prepublishOnly: test -d dist || (echo 'ERROR: dist/ missing. Run npm run build first.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp.js || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp.js missing. Run npm run build:wasm -- --llamacpp from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp.wasm || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp.wasm missing. Run npm run build:wasm -- --llamacpp from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp.worker.js || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp.worker.js missing. Pthreads-enabled builds MUST stage the Emscripten worker companion. Re-run npm run build:wasm -- --llamacpp from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.js || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.js missing. Run npm run build:wasm -- --webgpu --vlm from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.wasm || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.wasm missing. Run npm run build:wasm -- --webgpu --vlm from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1); test -f wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.worker.js || (echo 'ERROR: wasm/racommons-llamacpp-webgpu.worker.js missing. Pthreads-enabled builds MUST stage the Emscripten worker companion. Re-run npm run build:wasm -- --webgpu --vlm from sdk/runanywhere-web.' && exit 1)

author: RunAnywhere AI
